# Vendor Portfolio Analysis

The biggest vendor mistake is treating broad catalogs as proof of strong fit. Portfolio breadth can be an advantage, but only when the vendor is also strong in the specific device class, protocol context, and support model that the site requires.

## Review dimensions

- Category depth in the exact hardware family being considered.
- Ecosystem fit with the plant, integrator, or software stack already in place.
- Availability of technical support, documentation quality, and lifecycle clarity.
- Whether the vendor's strengths match the deployment environment or only the headline product category.
